heading: Inspectors of carcasses, etc., meat of which is intended for export; certificates of condition
label: 616 Inspectors of carcasses, etc., meat of which is intended for export; certificates of condition
text: For the purpose of the Secretary may appoint inspectors who shall be authorized to give an official certificate stating the condition in which said cattle, sheep, swine, goats, horses, mules, or other equines, and the meat thereof, are found.section 615 of this title
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to .section 84 of this title
Amendments1967—, §§ 3(b), 12(a), struck out “of Agriculture” after “Secretary”, and included horses, mules, or other equines in the list of animals.Pub. L. 90–201

Effective Date of 1967 AmendmentAmendment by effective , except that with respect to equines (other than horses) and their carcasses and parts thereof, meat, and meat food products thereof, amendment effective upon expiration of sixty days after , see , set out as an Effective Date note under .Pub.
